comment: fleet-ship engine routing - edit lanes freely; the orchestrator reads this at fleet start and on any steering sentence. Resolution order: user sentence override (run ledger) > this file > the skill's built-in table.

lanes.match: clear spec, schema/validator/wiring, 1-3 files, mechanical sweeps
lanes.reason: reads CLAUDE.md, cleanest fast lane (live evidence). reasoning=medium pinned: global ~/.codex/config.toml defaults max, wasteful on clear-spec mechanical work (user 2026-07-16); escalate effort with the lane on gate failure
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-02: route all mechanical to codex

lanes.match: mechanical implementation (same class as `mechanical`); use to PARALLELIZE across engines when several mechanical tickets are unblocked and the codex lane is busy
lanes.reason: grok 4.5 via grok CLI (v0.2.93). Second mechanical lane alongside codex - route to whichever has free capacity. Gate identically to codex; non-Claude pane so no Skill tool -> spell the discipline out in the brief.
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-10: grok 4.5 available, add as second mechanical engine, parallelize with codex

lanes.match: scoping, planning, spec/design-doc authoring, and REVIEW of plans/reports/diffs ONLY - never a build lane; route builds to mechanical (codex/grok) or judgment (opus, sonnet taste floor)
lanes.reason: Fable 5 - newest flagship, most expensive; reserve for high-leverage scoping/planning/review
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-12: fable only for scoping/planning tasks and reviewing plans and reports (persisted from post-epic run steer)

lanes.match: small well-defined mechanical: crisp spec, 1-3 files, renames/mop-ups/wiring/precise edits; near-instant iteration wanted
lanes.reason: gpt-5.3-codex-spark on Cerebras: 1000+ tok/s, verified live on this account 2026-07-02 (Pro research preview). Smaller model - above gpt-5.1-codex-mini, below full gpt-5.5-codex; gate HARD, escalate to mechanical lane on any ambiguity. Preview access can vanish - on model-not-found fall back to mechanical lane. reasoning=medium pinned (global default is max)
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-02: spark for well-defined mechanical tasks

lanes.match: critical-path mechanical chunk blocking the wave; latency matters more than credits
lanes.reason: codex fast mode: 1.5x speed at 2.5x credit burn (gpt-5.5) - NOT free; opt in per chunk, never bulk. ChatGPT sign-in only (API key ignores it). Post-launch fallback for TUI panes: send '/fast on' + Enter

lanes.match: critical-path judgment chunk blocking the wave; latency matters more than cost
lanes.reason: Claude fast mode via --settings flagSettings (no --fast CLI flag exists); opus 4.8/4.7 only - no effect on fable/sonnet; billed higher while active; org allowlist + overage/cooldown can silently drop it

lanes.match: burst parallelism only, when codex lane saturated
lanes.reason: convention mop-ups (bun:test/catchAll) + credit risk; gate hard

lanes.match: tracer-bullet dogfood of a merged chunk: run the app, exercise the new behavior + core smoke, report findings (no fixing)
lanes.reason: drive-app-and-report is taste-floor work (sonnet taste 7); escalate to opus for reactor-subtle merges; fable excluded per 2026-07-12 scoping/planning/review-only steer
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-16: agent launches were inheriting the expensive default model on non-judgment work

lanes.match: co-orchestrator: watchdog over the fable orchestrator + advisory judgment (TANDEM-JUDGE) - autonomous/overnight runs, default on; skip short attended runs
lanes.reason: second frontier perspective at max reasoning; read-only + advisory, orchestrator keeps gate/merge
lanes.origin: user 2026-07-16: restore fable+codex tandem orchestration from earlier runs
